description.value:
Agri-World

Agri-worlds are the breadbaskets of the Imperium — entire planets given over to the production of food for the teeming billions on nearby hive worlds. Life on an agri-world is one of endless toil under open skies, governed by the rhythms of planting, harvest, and tithe. The people are sturdy, communal, and possessed of a simple but deep faith. Though they may seem unsophisticated, their physical endurance and earnest devotion make them dependable servants of the Emperor.

Homeworld Bonus

+Fellowship, +Strength, –Willpower

Homeworld Aptitude

Strength

Wounds

8+1d5

Fate Threshold

2 (Emperor's Blessing 7+)

Starting Skills

Common Lore (Imperium) or Trade (any one)

Homeworld Trait

Blessed Ignorance: An agri-world character suffers a –5 penalty to all Forbidden Lore Tests, but gains a +5 bonus to tests to resist Fear and Pinning.

specialAbilities.name: Blessed Ignorance
specialAbilities.description: An agri-world character suffers a –5 penalty to all Forbidden Lore Tests, but gains a +5 bonus to tests to resist Fear and Pinning.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 7+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point.
